---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature maintains CompScan's local-only principle (no network egress)
- [ ] This feature works cross-platform (or is clearly platform-specific)
- [ ] This feature does not introduce security risks
